nl_query: Show the attempt rule configuration for question 2 in the Data Structures paper.
failed_sql:
SELECT ar.id AS rule_id, ar.rule_type, ar.min_select, ar.max_select, ar.config_json
FROM   attempt_rule                ar
JOIN   question                    q_parent ON q_parent.id = ar.question_id
WHERE  q_parent.qp_id = :qp_id
  AND  ar.question_id  = :question_id
ORDER  BY ar.id;
